bead.title: Add audit_id field to ChangeEvent in subscriptions.rs (prereq for US-082)
bead.description: File: axon-graphql/src/subscriptions.rs. ChangeEvent struct is missing audit_id: String field. Without it, a client has no resume point for since_audit_id on reconnect. Prerequisite for axon-7836eb3e (resumable subscriptions). Add audit_id: String to ChangeEvent. Populate from the source audit entry's ID when the subscription event is constructed. Must be present on both replayed and live events.
bead.acceptance: ChangeEvent struct has audit_id: String field; live subscription events have audit_id set to the triggering audit entry ID; field serializes correctly in the WebSocket message; existing subscription tests pass
